CheckTitle: Microsoft Forms internal phishing protection is enabled
Description: The Microsoft Forms organization settings should have **internal phishing protection** (**isInOrgFormsPhishingScanEnabled**) enabled. This scans forms for common phishing keywords and blocks the collection of responses while suspicious content is present.
Risk: Without internal **phishing** protection, malicious users (internal or compromised accounts) can use **Microsoft Forms** to create convincing phishing forms that harvest credentials or sensitive information from other employees.

Code.Other:
1. Navigate to the Microsoft 365 admin center at https://admin.microsoft.com/
2. Go to **Settings** > **Org settings** > **Services** > **Microsoft Forms**
3. Under **Phishing protection**, check **Add internal phishing protection**
4. Click **Save**

Recommendation.Text: Enable internal phishing protection for Microsoft Forms so forms are automatically scanned for phishing keywords.
